title: S'ran Droot
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=S'ran Droot |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrian]][[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|We cleared the decks, got the caps charged, ready to blaze.''"''
''"''Thanks, Droot. I owe you one.''"''
''"''Nah, I'm still two down—you had the station shining like a mirror on that last inspection. I got a smile out of the admiral himself that time.|S'ran Droot and [[Tenn Graneet]]|}} '''S'ran Droot''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrian]] [[Chief Petty Officer/Legends|Chief Petty Officer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. While assigned to the [[Port Heavy Blaster Station]] of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] [[Steel Talon/Legends|''Steel Talon'']] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he shared quarters with [[Tenn Graneet]]. As a [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrian]], he was one of few non-[[Human/Legends|Humans]] to achieve any rank in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. ==Appearances== *[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=S'ran Droot |fi=S'ran Droot }} [[Category:Chagrians|Droot, S'ran]] [[Category:Imperial Navy personnel of the Galactic Empire|Droot, S'ran]] [[Category:Males|Droot, S'ran]]
